Traffic, growth, and codebase signals for your published repos

reponomics.

Dashboard

Last updated: 2026-05-28 12:00 UTC | Published repos: 2 | 90 days of data

your versionv0.13.1 latest versionv0.13.1 View latest updates
Verification

Automatic in-browser checks: on export, the dashboard verifies encrypted asset size + SHA-256, decrypts with your key, then verifies decrypted ZIP SHA-256 against this page's embedded export-manifest before download.

Optional manual verification: Copy SHA-256 copies <sha256>  <filename> for checksum-file format. Use shasum -a 256 <downloaded-file.zip> to compare manually, or save the copied line and run shasum -a 256 -c <checksums.txt>.

Dashboard profile

Guidance tuned to the published repo set and the signals currently retained.

Attention
0 / 0
views / visitors in the selected window
Interest
+0 / +0
stars / watchers; current totals as context
Adoption
0 / +0
clones / forks; current total as context

Opportunity map

Published repos by attention and downstream growth. Bubble size follows clone activity.

Code activity ribbon

Commit and release clusters in the selected traffic window. Use it to inspect where code activity and attention sit near each other.

Readiness queue

Small public-facing fixes that make attention easier to convert into useful adoption or contribution.

Window

Choose a trailing collected-day window, or All data since collection began.

Visibility threshold
Hide repos with fewer than 1 combined views + clones in the selected window.
Collection health
Month
Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun

Collection status per day in the selected window.

Hover or focus a day to inspect collection details.

Published repos
Focus or compare within this published set

Traffic Overview

Focus repos, switch metrics, and use small code/release markers as nearby context.

Weekday Rhythm

Average daily views by weekday for the current scope.

By repository

Stacked when viewing all repos; lined up when focusing or comparing. Follows the metric tab above.

Top referrers

Where the traffic is coming from. Click a column to sort.

Popular content

Latest top-path rows, separated by repository.

Repositories

Focus or compare repositories from the published set.

Free for any user · No third parties · Personalized project signals · Private hosting on GitHub Pages
Built with Reponomics · Made for indie hackers shipping across many repos
